panels.description: Aggregate Pi lineage node graph built from low-cardinality Prometheus labels. The root node connects to observed agent roles, and agent roles connect to subagent depth nodes by spawn type and reason.

targets.expr: label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(vector(1), "id", "pi-root", "__name__", ".*"), "title", "Pi root", "id", ".*"), "subtitle", "workflow entry", "id", ".*"), "color", "blue", "id", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace((sum(observme_active_agents) by (agent_role) or sum(increase(observme_agent_runs_total[$__range])) by (agent_role)), "id", "agent_$1", "agent_role", "(.+)"), "title", "Agent: $1", "agent_role", "(.+)"), "subtitle", "active or observed role", "agent_role", "(.+)"), "color", "green", "agent_role", "(.+)") or label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(sum(increase(observme_subagents_spawned_total[$__range])) by (subagent_depth), "id", "subagents_depth_$1", "subagent_depth", "(.+)"), "title", "Subagents depth $1", "subagent_depth", "(.+)"), "subtitle", "spawned in range", "subagent_depth", "(.+)"), "color", "orange", "subagent_depth", "(.+)")

label_join(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace((sum(observme_active_agents) by (agent_role) or sum(increase(observme_agent_runs_total[$__range])) by (agent_role)), "source", "pi-root", "agent_role", "(.+)"), "target", "agent_$1", "agent_role", "(.+)"), "mainStat", "agents", "agent_role", "(.+)"), "color", "gray", "agent_role", "(.+)"), "id", ":", "source", "target") or label_join(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(sum(increase(observme_subagents_spawned_total[$__range])) by (agent_role, subagent_depth, spawn_type, spawn_reason), "source", "agent_$1", "agent_role", "(.+)"), "target", "subagents_depth_$1", "subagent_depth", "(.+)"), "mainStat", "spawns", "agent_role", "(.+)"), "color", "gray", "agent_role", "(.+)"), "id", ":", "source", "target", "spawn_type", "spawn_reason")

panels.title: Pi root → agents → subagents

panels.description: Subagent spawn topology by agent role, spawn reason, and resulting subagent depth. Use this graph to spot which agent roles fan out and why.

targets.expr: label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace((sum(observme_active_agents) by (agent_role) or sum(increase(observme_agent_runs_total[$__range])) by (agent_role)), "id", "agent_$1", "agent_role", "(.+)"), "title", "Agent: $1", "agent_role", "(.+)"), "subtitle", "active or observed role", "agent_role", "(.+)"), "color", "green", "agent_role", "(.+)") or label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(sum(increase(observme_subagents_spawned_total[$__range])) by (spawn_reason), "id", "spawn_reason_$1", "spawn_reason", "(.+)"), "title", "Spawn: $1", "spawn_reason", "(.+)"), "subtitle", "spawn reason", "spawn_reason", "(.+)"), "color", "purple", "spawn_reason", "(.+)") or label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(sum(increase(observme_subagents_spawned_total[$__range])) by (subagent_depth), "id", "subagents_depth_$1", "subagent_depth", "(.+)"), "title", "Subagents depth $1", "subagent_depth", "(.+)"), "subtitle", "spawned in range", "subagent_depth", "(.+)"), "color", "orange", "subagent_depth", "(.+)")

label_join(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(sum(increase(observme_subagents_spawned_total[$__range])) by (agent_role, spawn_reason, spawn_type), "source", "agent_$1", "agent_role", "(.+)"), "target", "spawn_reason_$1", "spawn_reason", "(.+)"), "mainStat", "spawns", "agent_role", "(.+)"), "color", "gray", "agent_role", "(.+)"), "id", ":", "source", "target", "spawn_type") or label_join(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(sum(increase(observme_subagents_spawned_total[$__range])) by (spawn_reason, subagent_depth), "source", "spawn_reason_$1", "spawn_reason", "(.+)"), "target", "subagents_depth_$1", "subagent_depth", "(.+)"), "mainStat", "depth", "spawn_reason", "(.+)"), "color", "gray", "spawn_reason", "(.+)"), "id", ":", "source", "target")

panels.title: Agent role → spawn reason → subagent depth
